sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83857" key="plhsise/lhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλησῐσέληνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">becoming full,</tr_> of the moon, Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg004.perseus-grc1:p.103H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.103H.</biblScope> </bibl>; opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πανσέληνος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">G.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
